free_text: 400keV Van de Graaff of the Gesellschaft
Bombardment of a Ti-T target with 120keV
deuterons. A range of incident neutron energies
were used by varying the target-source angle.
samples were placed at 6 degree intervals
corresponding to 30 to 50 keV steps in neutron
elastically scattered neutrons. Up to 2.9% scattering
for the reactions investigated in steps of 0.1 MeV are
given only in report (EANDC(E)-89,37). Data shown in
Tbl.1 of ERRATA (68WASH,1,1,1968) are the same but

feur Strahlenforschung, which is now Helmholtz
On. AUTHOR, INSTITUTE and FACILITY revised.
